titleStmt.title: SII 37.435: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 435. (A.R. No. E 33 of 1941-42.) Vēmavaram, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1085, Uttarāyaṇa, Sankrānti, corresponding to 1163 A.D.

It records gifts of sheep for the maintenance of perpetual lamps and also supply of ghee to the lamps in the temple of Mūlasthāna-Mahādēva by the chief Kēti-Nāyaka, son of Yerrama-Nāyaka and Vennasāni and the chief Rāṅki-Nūṅki-Nāyaka, son of Koṇḍapa Nāyaka and Yerakasani, for the merit of their parents.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
goṟiyalu 55 vīniṁjēkoni nāvabō
yini koḍku nannedana putrānu pautrikamu
nityamaneṁḍu neyivōyaṁgalavāṁḍu
yācaṁdrakamu . śrīyutuṁḍeṟiyama
nāyaku tanayuṁḍu valaṟaṭṭevara vaṁśava
¨rddhanuṁḍu daṁḍidānavinōdi gaṁḍaya tammu
ṁḍu vennamāṁba sutuṁḍu manumū¨rtti vī
ruṁḍu vīrāvatāruṁḍu vaṟacūri su
ravaṇadhīśuṁḍu naranātuṁḍu giri paścima
ṁbuna gurutaraṁbagu rāṁkipuramuna nela
konu suraharunaku sallalituṁḍu rāṁki
malaya maṟaṁdi trilōkanutuṁḍuvairi
bhīkaruṁḍu diramugā nakhaṁḍa dīpakaṁbe
ttiṁce dhīraguṇuṁḍu vaṁśava¨rddhanuṁḍu . Ari
sēnalūru muṭṭina pari
ḍi Ayyūra ceruvu tana naranu
ta śau¨ryyamunaṁbutta paralanaṁgānu
sakava¨rṣaṁbu 1085 nēṁṭi yuttarāyana sa
krāṁtti nimityamuna rāṁki śrīmūlasthā
na mahādēvaraku paṟaṁcūri kētināya
kuṁḍu damataṁḍri yeṟṟamanāyakunaku
vennasānki dha¨rmmā¨rtthamugā nakhaṁḍadīpaṁbu
nakuṁbeṭṭina goṟiyalu 55 vīniṁjēkoni
yuttanabōyini muduvedana putrānupautri
kamu nityamāneṁḍu nēyuvōyaṁgalavāṁḍu
śrīramaṇīyyuṁḍu vimalācāruṁḍu
catu¨rtthavaṁśa jalajāptuṁḍu vistāra ya
śōnidhi bhārata vīrābhuṁḍu nūkaṁḍatula
vikramuṁḍu¨rvvīni . śrīyutuṁḍu rāṁki koṇḍa
panāyakunaku neṟiyakamaku naṁdanuṁḍu ja
yaśrīyutuṁḍakhaṁḍadīpaṁbāyatamuga ne
tte śivunakacalitabhaktini . sakava¨rṣaṁbbu 1085
nēṁṭi yuttarāyana saṁkrāṁtti nimityamuna
rāṁkinūṁki nāyakuṁḍu dama taṁḍri
koṁḍapanāyakanaku yeṟakasāniki
dha¨rmmātthamugā śrīmūlasthāna mahā
dēvaraku nakhaṁḍa dīpamunakuṁ beṭṭina
lu 55 vīniṁjēkoni yeṟiyabō
le koḍku muttedana putrānu
pautrikamu nityamāneṁḍu neyivō
yaṁgalavāru . yī dīpamulu sva
dha¨rmmamuna nācaṁdrā¨rkkamunaḍapa
ṁgalavāru
Digital edition of SII 37.435 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
